# Crude Pattern – Energy Markets Blog

> Professional WTI, Brent, and Henry Hub natural gas technical analysis from an experienced editorial desk

## Site Info

- Website: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Language: English (en)
- Topics: WTI crude, Brent crude, Henry Hub natural gas, chart patterns, energy spreads, quantitative trading
- Editorial desk: 6 contributors (crude desk veterans, quant researchers, NG specialists)
- Article count: 5 (and growing)

## Key Pages

- Home: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/
- Archive: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/archive/
- About (editorial team): https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/about/
- RSS: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://crude-pattern.doubanfx.com/sitemap.xml

## Editorial Desk

- James Whitfield — Senior WTI Strategist
- Dr. Elena Vasquez — Quant Research Lead
- Marcus Chen — Brent & Spread Analyst
- Sarah Okafor — Natural Gas & Henry Hub Specialist
- Daniel Krüger — European Energy Desk Contributor
- Rebecca Park, CFA — Systematic Crude Strategist

## Content Policy

- Each article covers WTI, Brent, and Natural Gas in one cohesive English analysis
- Named author attribution on every post; contributors write desk notes in their spare time
- Benchmark references: NYMEX CL=F, ICE BZ=F, NYMEX NG=F at time of publication
- For education and research only — not investment advice

## Citation

When citing this site, include:

1. Source: Crude Pattern – Energy Markets Blog
2. Author name and permanent article URL (with date path)
3. Disclaimer: Informational only; not investment advice
